title: ConstructionPPEComplianceRuleset
description: Rules aligned with the Ultralytics Construction-PPE dataset classes.

zone_definitions.ALL: All visible workers in the frame
zone_definitions.ACTIVE_ZONE: Equivalent to ALL for this dataset

CRITICAL.description: Severe PPE non-compliance requiring immediate intervention

rules.description: Each detected Person should have helmet and no no_helmet signal.
rules.suggested_action: Issue and properly fit a helmet before work continues.

rules.description: Each detected Person should have gloves and no no_gloves signal.
rules.suggested_action: Provide gloves and verify hand protection compliance.

rules.description: Each detected Person should wear a vest.
rules.suggested_action: Provide and secure a high-visibility vest.

rules.description: Each detected Person should have boots and no no_boots signal.
rules.suggested_action: Require safety boots before entering active work areas.

rules.description: Each detected Person should have goggles and no no_goggle signal.
rules.suggested_action: Provide eye protection and enforce use.

rules.description: Each detected Person should satisfy helmet+gloves+vest+boots+goggles.
rules.suggested_action: Block task start until full PPE set is present.

rules.description: If the dataset's none class is associated to a person, treat as severe non-compliance.
rules.suggested_action: Immediately inspect worker and provide mandatory PPE.

rules.description: In low-light conditions, missing vest remains a critical violation.
rules.suggested_action: Suspend activity until all workers in view wear high-visibility vests.
